text.title: Node.js Service Patterns
text.summary: Express app structure, controller/service/repository split, typed error hierarchy, and Pino structured logging.

rule.statement: Controllers handle only HTTP concerns (parse request, call service, send response). Services contain business logic and have no HTTP imports. Repositories handle data access only.
rule.rationale: Business logic in controllers cannot be tested without an HTTP context. Service/repository separation enables unit testing without HTTP overhead and enables reuse from background jobs.
